description: China has ordered Meta to reverse its $2.5 billion acquisition of AI startup Manus within weeks, citing national security. This move signals a strong warning to Chinese tech founders against exporting sensitive innovations to geopolitical rivals.

'Dhurandhar 2' collection day 41: Ranveer Singh film eyes 9 year record of 'Baahubali 2'
description: On April 28, 2026, ‘Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge’ reached a worldwide gross of Rs. 1,779.02 crore, placing it just Rs. 10.54 crore away from beating ‘Baahubali 2’ to become the second highest-grossing Indian film globally. Directed by Aditya Dhar and starring Ranveer Singh, the film’s India net stands at Rs. 1,131.83 crore, continuing its pursuit of ‘Pushpa 2’s domestic record. Despite the IPL 2026 season and the release of ‘Bhooth Bangla,’ the espionage thriller remains a box office juggernaut.

Where is Candace Owens? Show cancelled amid WHCD and Cole Allen buzz
description: Candace Owens has sparked online speculation after canceling her show again, with a viral post questioning her whereabouts during the White House Correspondents Dinner incident and suggesting a possible link to Cole Allen. No verified evidence supports these claims, but her silence has fueled debate, highlighting how quickly unconfirmed narratives can spread across social media.

title: Fred Liu - Evelyn Ha’s ex backs Ben Pasternak, alleges abuse details
description: Fred Liu, Evelyn Ha’s ex-boyfriend, has supported parts of Ben Pasternak’s abuse claims after his arrest in New York. Pasternak denies all charges and says Ha was the aggressor. Liu shared that his past experience felt similar but stayed silent earlier. The case includes serious assault charges and is ongoing, with court proceedings expected on June 11.

title: What global banks said about Anthropic's Mythos that company ‘refused’ to release publicly
description: Anthropic's powerful AI model, Claude Mythos, capable of finding software vulnerabilities, has prompted a global financial sector scramble. Banks, regulators, and central bankers are urgently assessing risks and accelerating cybersecurity investments. Project Glasswing offers controlled access for defensive security work, highlighting the evolving threat landscape.

title: After $6.25 bn 'gift' to 'Trump Accounts', Michael & Susan Dell donate $750 mn
description: Michael and Susan Dell have donated $750 million to the University of Texas at Austin for a new medical center and research campus. This facility will integrate AI and advanced computing to improve patient care, research, and education, with construction beginning this year and opening by 2030. The donation builds on their extensive philanthropic history and commitment to Austin's growth.
